title: Bellamy Attacks the Dreamers
description: The Saruyama Alliance finishes the ship’s upgrades as the Straw Hats get ready for the impossible launch.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Bellamy, Sarquiss, Mont Blanc Cricket, Luffy, Nami. The Saruyama Alliance finishes the ship’s upgrades as the Straw Hats get ready for the impossible launch.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: What do you think you're doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Deflamingo, this is your doing, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Fufufufufufufufu! And quickly wrap up this meeting!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Fufufu! Well aren't you pretty high-minded...

summary: The Saruyama Alliance finishes the ship’s upgrades as the Straw Hats get ready for the impossible launch.
